description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages info, lint, build, package, test, delivery, deploy, and clean. Add an info job that runs in the info stage, uses the default image, executes `docker run mbentley/figlet -tf $font $message` and `eval $success`, and sets variables font=big, message="This is only a base information stage", success=true. Add a container:build job in the build stage that uses the kaniko executor image `gcr.io/kaniko-project/executor:debug` (entrypoint disabled), runs a series of shell commands to create Docker auth config, optionally add proxy settings, compute image namespace, name and tags, and finally runs `/kaniko/executor` with cache enabled to push the built image to `$CI_REGISTRY` and, if DELIVERY_REGISTRY is set, also to that registry. Add a .java job in the build stage that uses the Maven image `maven:${MAVEN_VERSION}-${JDK_TYPE}-${JAVA_VERSION}`, pulls a cache of compiled JARs (key java-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, path target/*.jar), and runs `mvn ${MAVEN_CLI_OPTS} ${MAVEN_ACTION} ${MAVEN_SETTINGS}` (default action -version). Include a warning_move_job_templates job that extends the .warning template, runs in the info stage, inherits the .info script, sets a custom warning message, allows failure, and deliberately fails the job. Ensure the pipeline respects the defined variables, caches, and pushes containers to the GitLab Container Registry (and optional delivery registry).
